message:
feat(abi): major POSIX surface expansion with C11 threads, filesystem ops, and enhanced stdio

Comprehensive expansion of the frankenlibc ABI layer, adding ~170 new
exported symbols and bringing the libc replacement significantly closer
to full POSIX.1-2017 compliance:

New module — C11 threads (c11threads_abi.rs + test):
- thrd_create, thrd_join, thrd_detach, thrd_exit, thrd_current,
  thrd_equal, thrd_sleep, thrd_yield
- mtx_init, mtx_lock, mtx_trylock, mtx_timedlock, mtx_unlock,
  mtx_destroy
- cnd_init, cnd_signal, cnd_broadcast, cnd_wait, cnd_timedwait,
  cnd_destroy
- tss_create, tss_get, tss_set, tss_delete
- call_once
All backed by native pthread primitives for zero-overhead interop.

Filesystem & I/O (unistd_abi.rs — +2230 lines):
- Full directory traversal: opendir/readdir/closedir/seekdir/telldir/
  rewinddir/scandir/fdopendir via native syscalls
- File operations: open/close/read/write/lseek/pread/pwrite/readv/
  writev/sendfile/copy_file_range/ftruncate/fallocate
- File metadata: stat/fstat/lstat/fstatat/access/faccessat/chmod/
  fchmod/fchmodat/chown/fchown/lchown/fchownat/utimensat/futimens
- Link operations: link/linkat/symlink/symlinkat/readlink/readlinkat/
  unlink/unlinkat/rename/renameat/renameat2
- Directory operations: mkdir/mkdirat/rmdir/getcwd/chdir/fchdir
- File descriptor: dup/dup2/dup3/fcntl/ioctl/pipe/pipe2
- Mount & filesystem: mount/umount2/statfs/fstatfs/statvfs/fstatvfs
- Memory mapping: mmap/munmap/mprotect/msync/madvise/mremap
- Poll/select: poll/ppoll/select/pselect/epoll_create1/epoll_ctl/
  epoll_wait/epoll_pwait
- Inotify: inotify_init1/inotify_add_watch/inotify_rm_watch
- Misc: sysconf/pathconf/fpathconf/confstr/uname/getrusage/
  getrlimit/setrlimit/prlimit

Enhanced stdio (stdio_abi.rs — +566 lines):
- Full format string support: printf/fprintf/sprintf/snprintf/
  dprintf/vprintf/vfprintf/vsprintf/vsnprintf/vdprintf
- Input: scanf/fscanf/sscanf family with format parsing
- File positioning: fseek/ftell/fgetpos/fsetpos/rewind
- Buffering: setvbuf/setbuf/setbuffer/setlinebuf
- File locking: flockfile/ftrylockfile/funlockfile
- Temporary files: tmpfile/tmpnam/mkstemp/mkdtemp

Process (process_abi.rs):
- Add wait3/wait4/waitid with rusage collection
- Add setpgid/getpgid/setsid/getsid session management
- Add prctl for process attribute control

Pthread (pthread_abi.rs):
- Add pthread_sigmask, pthread_kill for signal management
- Add pthread_setname_np/pthread_getname_np for thread naming
- Add pthread_setaffinity_np/pthread_getaffinity_np for CPU pinning

String (string_abi.rs):
- Add strsignal, basename, dirname POSIX string utilities
- Add memccpy, strndup, stpcpy, stpncpy missing POSIX entries
- Expand locale-aware string comparison stubs

Ctype (ctype_abi.rs):
- Add locale-variant _l suffixed functions (isalpha_l, toupper_l, etc.)
- Add wctype.h stubs (iswalpha, iswdigit, towupper, towlower, etc.)

Other modules:
- dirent_abi.rs: Add alphasort/versionsort comparators for scandir
- dlfcn_abi.rs: Add dladdr for reverse symbol lookup, expand dlinfo
- malloc_abi.rs: Add posix_memalign, pvalloc, malloc_usable_size
- math_abi.rs: Add fma/fmal/fmaf for fused multiply-add
- time_abi.rs: Add timer_create/timer_settime/timer_delete POSIX timers,
  add strftime_l locale variant
- stdlib_abi.rs: Add secure_getenv, mkstemp, mkdtemp, realpath
- runtime_policy.rs: Expand policy engine with per-syscall allow/deny
  granularity and audit logging mode

Version scripts (libc.map):
- Add 171 new GLIBC-compatible symbol version entries for linker
  interposition compatibility

Tests: Update test suites across inet, malloc, stdio, stdlib, and
string modules for new ABI surface coverage.

Core fixes:
- errno/mod.rs: Add missing errno constants
- stdio/file.rs: Expand FILE struct with positioning support
- stdio/scanf.rs: Fix format specifier parsing edge cases
- stdlib/random48.rs: Fix seed propagation in drand48/lrand48 family

Tracking: Update support_matrix.json and beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
